title: Implement real /ticks-plan scout and frontier synthesis flow
description: Replace informational /ticks-plan with actual parallel read-only Pi scouts, frontier-tier synthesis, validated tick-plan output, controller-owned tk creation, dependency wiring, and review/closeout process ticks. Support planning an existing childless epic or requirements into a new epic, with dry-run/approval safety.
acceptance_criteria: /ticks-plan --dry-run performs parallel fixture scouts and returns a validated vertical plan; explicit apply creates implementation ticks/dependencies plus role-tagged review/closeout via controller tk; malformed planner output causes no mutation; tests require no live model.
closed_reason: Completed: /ticks-plan now runs bounded parallel read-only scouts plus frontier synthesis, strictly validates vertical dependency-safe plans, supports model-running dry-run and explicit idempotent controller apply, creates canonical process skeleton, reports telemetry/artifacts, and recovers partial applies.
